occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Announces First European Leap Quantum Cloud Site

interaction_phrase: its first Leap quantum cloud-based system outside of North America at the Forschungszentrum Jülich Supercomputing Center
occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Systems Inc., the leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services, today announced that it will house its first Leap quantum cloud-based system outside of North America at the Forschungszentrum Jülich Supercomputing Center in Jülich, Germany.

interaction_phrase: access the system via D-Wave's Leap quantum cloud service
occurrence_sentence: Forschungszentrum Jülich and their government and academic customers will access the system via D-Wave's Leap quantum cloud service.

interaction_phrase: purchase access to the D-Wave Leap service and systems
occurrence_sentence: European business customers can also purchase access to the D-Wave Leap service and systems, including the Leap system located at Jülich.

interaction_phrase: its first Leap quantum cloud-based system outside of North America at the Forschungszentrum Jülich Supercomputing Center
occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Systems Inc., the leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services, today announced that it will house its first Leap quantum cloud-based system outside of North America at the Forschungszentrum Jülich Supercomputing Center in Jülich, Germany.

interaction_phrase: access the system via D-Wave's Leap quantum cloud service
occurrence_sentence: Forschungszentrum Jülich and their government and academic customers will access the system via D-Wave's Leap quantum cloud service.

interaction_phrase: the Leap system located at Jülich
occurrence_sentence: European business customers can also purchase access to the D-Wave Leap service and systems, including the Leap system located at Jülich.

interaction_phrase: the Leap Advantage quantum system located at Jülich
occurrence_sentence: With the new European Leap site, customers will be able to choose to run their quantum and hybrid applications on any Leap system, including the Leap Advantage quantum system located at Jülich.

interaction_phrase: benefit from the guidance of Jülich experts as they develop quantum algorithms and applications
occurrence_sentence: In addition, government and academic customers will be able to choose to either directly access Leap through D-Wave or benefit from the guidance of Jülich experts as they develop quantum algorithms and applications.
With the new European Leap site, customers will be able to choose to run their quantum and hybrid applications on any Leap system, including the Leap Advantage quantum system located at Jülich.

"Customers worldwide have been asking us to bring the D-Wave technologies to their regions. This announcement furthers our expansion into Europe and benefits industry and science by aligning the latest in quantum computing technologies with Julich's deep quantum expertise. Together, we'll bring practical quantum application development to Europe."

"At Forschungszentrum Jülich we help to solve highly complex questions from science and industry with high social relevance. We are leaders in the use of supercomputers in simulation, Big Data and AI," explains Prof. Wolfgang Marquardt, CEO, Forschungszentrum Jülich.

interaction_phrase: is a new customer for D-Wave
occurrence_sentence: While Forschungszentrum Jülich Supercomputing Center is a new customer for D-Wave, the organization is well respected for their deep quantum expertise and is known for their comprehensive work on the [technology readiness assessment of quantum computing platforms](http://orap.irisa.fr/wp-content/uploads/2017/12/Orap_Forum41_Presentation_Kristel-Miechielsen.pdf),

interaction_phrase: bringing the D-Wave technologies to their regions
occurrence_sentence: Customers worldwide have been asking us to bring the D-Wave technologies to their regions. This announcement furthers our expansion into Europe and benefits industry and science by aligning the latest in quantum computing technologies with Julich's deep quantum expertise.

interaction_phrase: are being used by ... Lockheed Martin
occurrence_sentence: D-Wave's systems are being used by some of the world's most advanced organizations, including Lockheed Martin, Volkswagen, DENSO, USRA, USC, Los Alamos National Laboratory and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.

D-Wave's systems are being used by some of the world's most advanced organizations, including Lockheed Martin, Volkswagen, DENSO, USRA, USC, Los Alamos National Laboratory and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.
